zh.lifeSummary: 當George Woodward於1507年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾厄普頓時，他的父親Lord John Woodward30歲，母親Marjorie Collingridge26歲。他於1527年與Agnes Mitchell在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年3月在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Woodward于1507年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾厄普頓时，他的父亲Lord John Woodward30岁，母亲Marjorie Collingridge26岁。他于1527年与Agnes Mitchell在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年3月在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When George Woodward was born in 1507, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Lord John Woodward, was 30 and his mother, Marjorie Collingridge, was 26. He married Agnes Mitchell in 1527, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died in March 1552, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Woodward est né en 1507, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Woodward, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Collingridge, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Mitchell en 1527, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1552, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Woodward 1507 in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Woodward 30 und seine Mutter Marjorie Collingridge 26. Er hat 1527 in Wiltshire, England Agnes Mitchell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb im März 1552 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Woodward è nato il nel 1507 nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Lord John Woodward, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie Collingridge, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Mitchell nel 1527, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1552, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Woodwardが1507年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで生まれた時，父Lord John Woodwardは30歳，母Marjorie Collingridgeは26歳であった。1527年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでAgnes Mitchellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年3月に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Woodward(이)가 1507년 영국 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Woodward(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Collingridge(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1527년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Agnes Mitchell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 3월 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Woodward nasceu em 1507, em Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Woodward, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Collingridge, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Mitchell em 1527, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1552, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Woodward родился в 1507 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Woodward было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Collingridge, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Mitchell в 1527 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер марта 1552 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Woodward nació en 1507, en Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Woodward, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marjorie Collingridge, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnes Mitchell en 1527, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1552, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
